# Project instructions

Preserve this user-authored sentence.

<!-- specspine:begin -->
## Architecture

Before planning, specifying, implementing, or reviewing a change, read
`specspine/README.md` and follow only relevant links. `Decisions` and
`Constraints` are accepted intent; `Observed`, `Inferred`, and `Open questions`
do not override it. Preserve conflicts instead of reconciling them silently.
Write all SpecSpine documentation in English.

<!-- specspine:end -->
